headline: Thames Water agrees £749m creditor takeover deal
body: Thames Water has agreed a £749m takeover by its creditors, averting special administration. The deal restructures the company's debt and brings in new equity.
why_matters: Major restructuring of the UK's largest water company — directly relevant to turnaround and regulatory work.

headline: Ofwat confirms £44.7m enforcement package for Welsh Water
body: Ofwat has confirmed a £44.7m enforcement package for Welsh Water over sewage spills.

headline: National Grid told to approve £4.5bn transmission spend
body: National Grid says the money is needed to invest in the network over five years.

headline: BT CEO on why telecoms needs more strikers
body: BT's chief executive sets out a growth strategy in a wide-ranging interview.
